source_title: 别让电视只看新闻，一根线直接变家庭KTV

style_guide.format: vertical short video, 9:16, realistic commercial keyframe
style_guide.visual_style: clean Chinese ecommerce short-video ad, warm family living room, practical product demo, natural light, high clarity
style_guide.characters: Chinese family, presenter, grandparents, parents, child when needed
style_guide.product: compact home karaoke and cinema set-top box, HDMI cable, TV screen, wireless microphones, remote control
style_guide.continuity: use the same cozy living room, same TV wall, same product kit, consistent wardrobe and warm lighting across keyframes

storyboard.visual_beat: 首秒用强反差快切：0.3秒黑屏电视/新闻画面，0.3秒全家无聊坐沙发，下一帧立刻切到同一台电视上的KTV点歌界面和家里开唱热闹画面
storyboard.voiceover: 别再让家里电视只看新闻了。1根线、2步连上，普通电视直接变家庭KTV，还能看电影。你家电视现在最常拿来看什么？
storyboard.subtitle: 电视别闲着｜1根线2步连上｜秒变家庭KTV
storyboard.camera: medium-wide living-room shot, family and TV both visible
storyboard.motion: fast cut, strong contrast, energetic opening beat
storyboard.keyframe_prompt: Create keyframe S01 for a vertical 9:16 Chinese short-video advertisement. Campaign title: 别让电视只看新闻，一根线直接变家庭KTV. Scene: 首秒用强反差快切：0.3秒黑屏电视/新闻画面，0.3秒全家无聊坐沙发，下一帧立刻切到同一台电视上的KTV点歌界面和家里开唱热闹画面. Ad purpose: 反差/悬念. Target audience: 家里有普通电视、想低成本升级家庭娱乐的家庭用户，重点覆盖有家庭聚会需求、经常在家陪长辈、觉得去KTV麻烦又花钱的人群。. Core product promise: 只需一根线连接普通电视，就能实现K歌+观影+多娱乐功能一体；曲库多且实时更新；语音点歌简单适合长辈；下单赠送无线麦克风，适合家庭聚会和居家娱乐转化。. Show a realistic home karaoke and cinema product demo in a cozy modern Chinese living room: a TV, compact set-top box, HDMI cable, wireless microphones, remote control, and family members interacting naturally. Make the product and TV interface clearly visible, with believable hands-on operation and warm family energy. Voiceover context: 别再让家里电视只看新闻了。1根线、2步连上，普通电视直接变家庭KTV，还能看电影。你家电视现在最常拿来看什么？. Optional large overlay caption concept for later editing: 电视别闲着｜1根线2步连上｜秒变家庭KTV. Photorealistic, commercial lighting, sharp focus, stable composition, no brand logos, no watermark, no tiny unreadable UI text.
storyboard.negative_prompt: Avoid distorted hands, extra fingers, fake logos, messy cables unless requested, unreadable dense text, foreign-language captions, low-resolution screen UI, over-stylized illustration, dark blurry image, watermark.

storyboard.visual_beat: 最后定格主持人站在电视旁，手里举着主机和一根高清线
storyboard.voiceover: 别再让家里电视只看新闻了。1根线、2步连上，普通电视直接变家庭KTV，还能看电影。你家电视现在最常拿来看什么？

storyboard.visual_beat: 长辈拿遥控器找节目、孩子坐一旁、夫妻表情无奈
storyboard.voiceover: 出去唱歌要约时间、要花钱，在家想热闹又怕设备麻烦。尤其爸妈想唱老歌、听戏曲，操作一复杂就不想用了。这个就是把K歌和观影合到一起的一体机，不用换电视，也不用配一堆设备。
storyboard.subtitle: 去KTV麻烦又花钱｜长辈怕复杂｜不用换电视
storyboard.camera: close-up product demo shot, hands and device in frame

storyboard.visual_beat: 核心演示采用连贯三连证据：先拍接口特写，主持人拿一根高清线，一端插主机、一端插电视
storyboard.voiceover: 安装就这么简单：1根线，2步连上，开机就进点歌页。这个界面就跟KTV点歌台一样，热门榜、经典老歌、家庭歌单都能直接找。曲库丰富，持续更新，家里人想唱的歌更容易找到。不会打字也没关系，直接对着遥控器说歌名，长辈也能轻松点。想看电影、追剧，再一切换就行，不只是K歌机，是客厅里的家庭影音娱乐一体机。
storyboard.subtitle: 插线即用｜开机直达点歌页｜像KTV一样好找歌｜语音点歌 长辈也会｜K歌+影视一体
storyboard.camera: close-up product demo shot, hands and device in frame
